note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 3.3 cm x 2.9 cm x 1.5 cm.
  Wound bed: 57% slough, 43% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.

Pt seen for wound eval. Diabetic Left foot measures aprx 3.3 x 2.9cm, depth 1.5cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R heel 2.0x1.7, 0.8cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
